title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at HomeLane Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at HomeLane Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at HomeLane Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About HomeLane Ventures Solutions:
HomeLane Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeLane Ventures Solutions!
